prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2025年该校在山东省综合类最低录取位次约14159名，为目前可获取的最近一年基准位次；该校在山东省2025年计划招生48人，2026年计划招生54人，较2025年扩招6人（增幅约12.5%），扩招使竞争略有缓解，但位次数字相应后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京师范大学（珠海校区）为985、211、双一流高校，共享北京师范大学本部学科资源；软科主榜排名约第19名（2026年），属全国顶尖高校行列；北京师范大学2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第37位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，未出现明显报考降温信号；北师大拥有教育学A+、心理学A+、中国语言文学A+、中国史A+、地理学A+、马克思主义理论A+等6个A+学科及12个A/A-学科，学科实力雄厚，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度为分化观望，但北师大作为师范类最高学府仍具品牌效应；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增长约5.7%，考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14159名、2026年扩招12.5%、山东省考生规模增长约5.7%以及学校声誉稳定等因素，预测2026年最低录取位次约15271名，较2025年小幅后移；区间14771–15771名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人文科学试验班（汉语言文学、英语、历史学）
- 社会科学试验班（经济学<数据科学方向>、金融科技）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、物理学、系统科学与工程、数据科学与大数据技术、应用统计学、人工智能<创新实验班>）
- 教育学（北师大教育学、北理AI联合学位培养项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（地理科学、心理学、生物科学、化学）
- 管理科学（钱学森智能管理卓越人才实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约15271名，区间14771–15771名。建议位次在14700名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档的人文科学试验班和社会科学试验班；位次在15000–15500名之间的考生以二档的数学类和教育学联合项目为主攻方向；位次在15500名以后的考生可将三档的理科试验班作为保底选择。数学类因涵盖人工智能、数据科学等热门方向，实际竞争可能高于历史位次表现，需预留余量。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum admission rank for this university in Shandong Province's comprehensive category was approximately 14159, which is the most recent baseline rank available; the university plans to enroll 48 students in Shandong Province in 2025 and 54 students in 2026, an increase of 6 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 12.5%), which slightly eases competition but shifts the rank number backward accordingly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing the disciplinary resources of the main campus of Beijing Normal University; it ranks approximately 19th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities; the reputation evaluation of Beijing Normal University in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative events; it ranks 37th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, showing no obvious signal of declining application enthusiasm; BNU has 6 A+ disciplines including Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Geography A+, and Marxist Theory A+, as well as 12 A/A- disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength, maintaining continuous appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors is divided and wait-and-see, but BNU, as the highest institution in teacher training, still has a brand effect; the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% compared to about 681,000 in 2025, and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline rank of 14159, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 12.5%, the growth of Shandong Province's candidate pool by about 5.7%, and the stable reputation of the university, the predicted minimum admission rank for 2026 is about 15271, slightly shifted backward compared to 2025; the range is 14771–15771.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Chinese Language and Literature, English, History)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (Economics <Data Science Direction>, Financial Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Systems Science and Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Applied Statistics, Artificial Intelligence <Innovation Experimental Class>)
- Education (BNU Education, BIT AI Joint Degree Training Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Geography, Psychology, Biology, Chemistry)
- Management Science (Qian Xuesen Intelligent Management Excellence Talent Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted rank is about 15271, with a range of 14771–15771. It is recommended that candidates with a rank within 14700 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1's Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class and Social Sciences Experimental Class; candidates with a rank between 15000–15500 should target Tier 2's Mathematics Class and Education Joint Program as their main direction; candidates with a rank above 15500 can use Tier 3's Science Experimental Class as a safety choice. The Mathematics Class, due to its inclusion of popular directions such as Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, may have actual competition higher than historical rank performance, so a buffer should be reserved.
